---
title: "Using R for reproductible data management and analyses in Forest Sciences"
subtitle: "PPG Ciências florestais - Universidade de Brasilia"
author: Géraldine Derroire
institute: Cirad - UnB
---

This is the course material for the module *Using R for reproducible data management and analyses in Forest Sciences* of the University of Brasilia - Post-graduate program in Forest Sciences, delivered by Géraldine Derroire (Cirad-University of Brasilia).


Course syllabus in English is [here](EFL360457_R_for_Forest_Sciences_2026.pdf), and in Portuguese [here](EFL360457_R_para_Ciencias_Florestais_2026.pdf).

**This is the version of 2026**. The material will be progressively added here in the coming weeks.

The course material has been created using quarto and R version 4.6.1.

Follow [these instructions](0_installing_enviro/install_enviro.html) to set up the working environment.

<!--
-   [Course introduction](99_archives/2025/0_course_introduction/course_intro.html)

-   [Principles of reproductible science](99_archives/2025/1_reproducible_science/repro_science.html)

-   [Getting started with R](99_archives/2025/2_getting_started/getting_started.html)

    -   [Exercices on session 2/3](99_archives/2025/2_getting_started/exo_getting_started_1.pdf)

    -   [Exercices on session 3/3](99_archives/2025/2_getting_started/exo_getting_started_2.pdf)

-   [Working with data](99_archives/2025/3_manip_data/manip_data.html)

    -   [Exercices](99_archives/2025/3_manip_data/exo_manip_data.pdf)

-   [Introduction to the tidyverse](99_archives/2025/4_tidyverse/tidyverse.html)

    -   [Exercice on session 1/2](99_archives/2025/4_tidyverse/exo_tidyverse_1.pdf)

    -   [Exercices on session 2/2](99_archives/2025/4_tidyverse/exo_tidyverse_2.pdf)

-   [Data visualisation with ggplot](99_archives/2025/5_graph/graph_ggplot.html)

    -   [Exercices](99_archives/2025/5_graph/exo_graph.pdf)

-   Statistics with R

    -   [Statistics with R session 1/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session1.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 1/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/exo_stats_session_1.pdf)

    -   [Statistics with R session 2/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session2.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 2/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/exo_stats_session_2.pdf)

    -   [Statistics with R session 3/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session3.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 3/3](99_archives/2025/6_basic_statistics/exo_stats_session_3.pdf)

-   Going further with R

    -   [Going further with R session 1/2](99_archives/2025/7_going_further/going_further_session1.html)

    -   [Going further with R session 2/2](99_archives/2025/7_going_further/going_further_session2.html)

    -   [Exercices](99_archives/2025/7_going_further/going_further.pdf)

-   [Introduction to Version Control with Git and GitHub](99_archives/2025/8_version_control/version_control.html)

-   [Literate programming with quarto](99_archives/2025/9_literate_programming/literate_programming.html)

--> 

### Previous versions:

* [Version 2025](99_archives/2025/index_2025.html)
